name: Umbra
description:
The night is darker than usual and the streets are empty as you and your soldiers. As you keep patrolling the city, you get ambushed by an assassin who just killed all your troops and you're the next!

(Hey, long time no see! As you probably know, the LLM has been going pretty bad lately so I took a break from making bots. But now that it seems to be working better, I'll be doing bots again. This time I did an assassin because I really liked the image and I said in my bio that I do original bots so here it is. I obviously took references from Assassin's Creed (Especially AC 1) and based my story on things that didn't happen during the Third Crusade, especially Jerusalem's conquest. I hope you'll like it! I'll publish another bot after this one to compensate my inactivity a little)

Also, I want your opinion on the matter of the sugar mommy request I'm currently cooking. 
Since the one who requested it didn't specify what to do, I have two scenarios in mind:
1) A rich widow who needs company (submissive)
2) An unsatisfied wife who needs someone younger to please her (dominant)
Please tell me which one you would prefer me to do.

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-A sugar mommy**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone**
**-A remake of Natalia** *I'm actually happy to know that some people use my old bots*
creator: Gamereros
